must_demonstrate.criterion: Test before code: for each TDD step, the test file is written before implementation code.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows a test created before the implementation for each TDD step.

must_demonstrate.criterion: RED confirmed: each test is run and confirmed failing before any implementation, with failure output shown.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output includes the failing command or failure excerpt before the GREEN implementation.

must_demonstrate.criterion: GREEN minimal: implementation is the simplest code that passes, without extra features or premature abstractions.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output states the minimal implementation and explicitly avoids out-of-scope features.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Format and lint after GREEN: runs formatting and lint fixing immediately after tests pass.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows format and lint commands after the GREEN test run.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Comprehension check: after GREEN, asks a specific question grounded in actual code, not a generic prompt.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output includes one targeted code-understanding question tied to the changed behavior.

must_demonstrate.criterion: REFACTOR only when green: design improvements happen after tests pass, not during RED or GREEN.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output sequences refactoring after the passing test evidence.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Format and lint after REFACTOR: runs formatting and lint fixing after refactoring.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows format, lint, and tests after refactoring.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Review the diff: re-reads changes with fresh eyes before moving on.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output includes a diff review command or explicit diff review step.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Task ordering respected: later tasks start only after dependencies are complete and checked.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows Task 2 starts only after Task 1 completion or commit.

must_demonstrate.criterion: One commit per task: no commits inside the inner TDD loop, but each completed plan task is verified, staged, previewed, approved, and committed before the next task starts.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows task-boundary staging/preview/approval, not inner-loop commits.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Pause before commit: says "Changes staged. Say 'commit' to proceed." and waits for explicit signal.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output includes the exact approval gate before commit.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Plan progress updated after each task commit.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output records progress updates after task completion.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Teach-back at task boundary: asks one targeted question on the riskiest part when the adaptive trigger fires.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output includes one risk-focused teach-back question at the task boundary.

must_demonstrate.criterion: AC verification before staging checks each AC has positive, negative, and edge coverage; critical paths from quality-gates.md are covered at 100%.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output maps AC coverage before staging.

must_demonstrate.criterion: AT outer loop: before inner unit TDD, writes failing acceptance tests named test_ac_<what>_<condition>, one per AC, testing observable outcomes at the system boundary.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows acceptance tests named with the test_ac_ convention before unit work.

must_demonstrate.criterion: Verify before claiming complete: runs the project's test command in this session and shows the runner output before any "done", "tests pass", or "all green" claim. Does not accept the user's word ("tests pass on my machine") as evidence.
must_demonstrate.evidence: Output shows the test command invocation and its result paired with any pass/done claim — never asserts pass without runner evidence.

must_not.criterion: Write multiple tests at once before implementing any.
must_not.evidence: Output must not show multiple unit tests written before a GREEN step.

must_not.criterion: Write implementation code without a failing test.
must_not.evidence: Output must not skip the failing-test evidence.
Output must not refactor before a passing test run.

must_not.criterion: Skip running tests or defer them until later.
Commit inside the inner TDD loop before the current task's AC coverage is verified.
must_not.evidence: Output must not commit before task-level AC checks.

must_not.criterion: Batch multiple plan tasks into one end-of-story commit.
must_not.evidence: Output must not combine multiple tasks into one commit.

must_not.criterion: Add features not in the plan.
must_not.evidence: Output must not implement discovered or optional features.

must_not.criterion: Guess when an acceptance criterion is ambiguous.
must_not.evidence: Output should ask when AC ambiguity changes behavior.
Output must stop at local commits.
Output must include the adaptive comprehension check when triggered.
Output must include the approval gate before commit.

must_not.criterion: Skip format or lint after GREEN or REFACTOR.
must_not.evidence: Output must not omit post-GREEN or post-REFACTOR cleanup.

must_not.criterion: Claim tests pass, done, or all green based on the user's word, without running the test command in this session.
must_not.evidence: Output must not echo a user-supplied pass claim without producing test runner output.

quality_signals.criterion: Test names match the test_<what>_<condition> convention.

quality_signals.evidence: Output or code review notes identify AAA structure.

quality_signals.criterion: Each test covers one behavior only.
quality_signals.evidence: Output avoids broad multi-assertion scenario tests.

quality_signals.criterion: Unit tests have no I/O: no database, network, or filesystem.
quality_signals.evidence: Output keeps I/O behind integration tests or doubles.

quality_signals.criterion: Domain objects have no infrastructure dependencies.
quality_signals.evidence: Output keeps infrastructure adapters outside domain objects.

quality_signals.criterion: Integration tests use SendGrid test doubles, not real API calls.
quality_signals.evidence: Output shows a fake or test double for SendGrid.

quality_signals.criterion: No magic strings: error codes and event names are named constants.
quality_signals.evidence: Output names event or error strings as constants.

quality_signals.criterion: Domain vocabulary from domain-language.md is used consistently.
quality_signals.evidence: Output names code and tests with project vocabulary.

quality_signals.criterion: Discovered work, if any, is added to the plan's Discovered section and not implemented.
quality_signals.evidence: Output records discovered work without expanding scope.
